decision_nodes.title: Choose LLM provider for F.2 spec generation
decision_nodes.question: Which LLM API maximizes citation accuracy + p95 latency within cost ceiling?

empirical_priors.rationale: OpenRouter accuracy = weighted mean of routed models; no single atlas entry.

math_derivation.formula: weighted mean of routed model atlas entries

empirical_priors.rationale: Adds ~300ms routing hop over base provider.
Compound availability across routed providers is lower than single-provider.

decision_nodes.title: Choose vector store for RAG (F.6 recommendation)
decision_nodes.question: Which vector store balances query p95 latency, cost, and operational simplicity?

alternatives.name: pgvector (Supabase Postgres)
alternatives.description: Same DB as app — one system.

empirical_priors.rationale: No marginal cost: same DB as app tier.

decision_nodes.title: Choose orchestration runtime for F.2..F.7 chain
decision_nodes.question: Which agent-orchestration framework minimizes integration cost + supports stateful workflows?

empirical_priors.rationale: Custom implementation can match requirements exactly but adds build cost.
Custom TS has minimal framework overhead.
LangGraph is open-source, no runtime license cost.
Custom code has lower maturity-day-1 availability.

decision_nodes.title: Choose deployment target for Next.js app tier
decision_nodes.question: Which hosting platform meets NFR-04 customer-overhead cap and availability targets?

empirical_priors.rationale: Team plan pricing at current tier.

edges.rationale: LLM choice constrains orchestration adapters needed.

dominance_math.formula: A dominates B iff ∀c score_c(A) ≥ score_c(B) ∧ ∃c score_c(A) > score_c(B)
